name: section-36.1-opener
prompt: Whimsical digital illustration in warm cartoon style: a traditional deterministic vending machine (left, rigid, mechanical, dispensing identical items) next to a glowing AI oracle booth (right, colorful, swirling with probability clouds and question marks). A confused developer stands between them holding a product roadmap. Soft gradients, playful proportions, no text.

name: section-36.2-opener
prompt: Whimsical digital illustration in warm cartoon style: a horizontal spectrum dial like a radio tuner, with 'Copilot' on the left (a small friendly robot assistant handing a document to a human) and 'Autopilot' on the right (a large robot sitting alone at a desk). The dial's needle points to the middle. Five small icons below represent roles: pencil (drafter), tag (classifier), signpost (router), magnifying glass (researcher), checkmark shield (verifier). Soft gradients, playful proportions, no text.

name: section-36.3-opener
prompt: Whimsical digital illustration in warm cartoon style: a developer wearing headphones sits at a glowing monitor, with a circular loop of colorful arrows around them labeled with icons: eye (observe), hand on steering wheel (steer), sparkle (generate), clipboard (document). Musical notes and code snippets float in the background suggesting a creative flow state. Soft gradients, playful proportions, no text.

name: section-36.4-opener
prompt: Whimsical digital illustration in warm cartoon style: a vertical rocket launch pad where the rocket is built from stacked colorful building blocks (each block a different prototype stage). A small founder figure stands at the base with a clipboard, watching the rocket. Three circular arrows surround the rocket: Build (hammer icon), Measure (ruler icon), Steer (compass icon). Soft gradients, playful proportions, no text.

name: section-36.5-opener
prompt: Whimsical digital illustration in warm cartoon style: a balance scale where one side holds a glowing AI brain (representing capability) and the other holds a stack of gold coins with tiny token symbols (representing cost). A startup founder peers through a magnifying glass at the balance point. A small checklist clipboard floats nearby with green checkmarks. Soft gradients, playful proportions, no text.

name: section-36.6-opener
prompt: Whimsical digital illustration in warm cartoon style: a timeline path from left to right showing five stations, each with a small friendly AI robot helping a human with a different task: brainstorming (lightbulbs), writing requirements (document), building code (laptop), testing (magnifying glass), and launching (rocket). The path connects all stations with a glowing golden thread. Soft gradients, playful proportions, no text.
